title: RCT Badges - Cobblemon Pokemon Badges
description: Leaders from Radical Cobblemon Trainers will drop badges from the Cobblemon Pokemon Badges mod.
body:
# RCT Badges - Cobblemon Pokemon Badges

A data pack for [Radical Cobblemon Trainers](https://modrinth.com/mod/rctmod) (**version `0.14` and above**) that provides loot tables for all gym leaders to additionaly drop badges from the [Cobblemon Pokemon Badges](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-pokemon-badges) mod, **after their first defeat against a player**.

> Also changes the advancement icons to match the corresponding badge items.
